name: Existing Claim - No Claim Number
description: Caller wants status but can't find the claim number.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I want an update on my claim but I can't find my claim number anywhere.
expectedOutcome: Agent advises checking the email used at submission (confirmation email + a second email with the claim number), then still warm-transfers to a specialist with available context. No fabricated lookup.
